hooks.command: b=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "$b" = "main" ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Lumen workflow: no direct commits to main. Create a feat/ or fix/ branch and open a PR (see CONTRIBUTING.md)."}}' || true
